lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello. What is it you do here?

lines.speaker: Elder Torgan
lines.text: I'm Torgan, one of the elders. I'm something of a specialist when it comes to fletching. In particular, I guide the juveniles as they fletch their own spear during their Trial by Water.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds like quite an important job.

lines.speaker: Elder Torgan
lines.text: Indeed it is, young one. There has always been a tortugan fletcher in charge of the Trial. Before me it was Elder Manna, who taught me all that I know. Before him it was Elder Sarr.

lines.speaker: Elder Torgan
lines.text: Eventually, I will be succeeded as well. There are many tortugan adults out there who studied under me as juveniles. One day, one of them will take on my role.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How will you know when it's time?

lines.speaker: Elder Torgan
lines.text: Every adult will one day return to the Conch. With their adventuring days at an end, they will settle here as an elder.

lines.speaker: Elder Torgan
lines.text: Whenever that happens, it is a chance for us current elders to consider if the time has come to take a step back. Soon, it will be time for me to hand over my duties, but until then, my work continues.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. Thank you for the information.
